11:["$","$L9b",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n\n# Basic storage\nmem.remember(\"User prefers dark mode.\")\n\n# With entity extraction: captures \"PostgreSQL\" as a triple\nmem.remember(\"We decided to use PostgreSQL.\", extract_entities=True)\n\n# With fact extraction: LLM pulls structured facts\nmem.remember(\n  \"The project deadline moved to June 15th. Alice is the lead.\",\n  extract=True,\n  importance=0.8,\n)\n","language":"python"}]

recall"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_weight"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"float"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"How much recency decay influences the final score (0.0-1.0). Default 0.0 (disabled)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"query_time"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str | None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"ISO 8601 timestamp to use as \"now\" for temporal decay calculations"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_halflife"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"float | None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Half-life in hours for the exponential recency decay. Default from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TEMPORAL_HALFLIFE_HOURS"}]," (24h)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_weight"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"float | None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Weight for vector similarity score. Default from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_WEIGHT"}]," (0.5)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_weight"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"float | None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Weight for FTS5 text relevance score. Default from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_FTS_WEIGHT"}]," (0.3)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"importance_weight"}]}],"$L9c","$L9d","$L9e"]}]]}]]}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":["Each result dict includes keys like ",["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"timestamp"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"score"}],", and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tier"}]," (indicating working vs. episodic)."]}]
17:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"get"}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":["Retrieve a single memory by its primary key. Pure read, no side effects. Checks working memory first (fast path), then episodic memory (fallback). Returns ",["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]," if not found."]}]

3e:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Parameter"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"--"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"The memory content to compress"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"method"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\"auto\""}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Compression method: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"dict\""}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"rle\""}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"semantic\""}],", or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"auto\""}]," (tries dict first, falls back to RLE)"]}]]}]]}]]}]

",["$","code",null,{"children":"CompressionStats"}]," includes ",["$","code",null,{"children":"original_size"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"compressed_size"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"ratio"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"method"}],", and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"savings_percent"}],"."]}]

47:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"detect_patterns"}]

4a:["$","p",null,{"children":["If ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memories"}]," is ",["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}],", uses all valid working + episodic memories. 4f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"get_all_memories"}]
50:["$","p",null,{"children":"Return all working + episodic rows for analysis."}]
51:["$","$L9b",null,{"code":"get_all_memories() -> list[dict]\n","language":"python"}]
52:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns all valid, non-superseded, non-expired memories across working and episodic tiers, scoped to the current session and global memories. Useful as input to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_patterns()"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"summarize_patterns()"}],"."]}]
53:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"sync_to"}]
54:["$","p",null,{"children":"Compute a delta for a peer -- returns changes since the last sync checkpoint."}]
55:["$","$L9b",null,{"code":"sync_to(\n  peer_id: str,\n  table: str = \"working_memory\",\n) -> dict\n","language":"python"}]
56:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns ",["$","code",null,{"children":"{peer_id, table, delta, count}"}],". The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"delta"}]," is a list of memory dicts that have changed since the last sync."]}]
57:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"sync_from"}]
58:["$","p",null,{"children":"Apply a delta received from a peer."}]
59:["$","$L9b",null,{"code":"sync_from(\n  peer_id: str,\n  delta: list,\n  table: str = \"working_memory\",\n) -> dict\n","language":"python"}]
5a:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns ",["$","code",null,{"children":"{peer_id, table, stats, checkpoint}"}]," with import statistics and an updated sync checkpoint."]}]
5b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Subsystem Properties"}]
5c:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," instance exposes several lazy-initialized subsystems:"]}]
5d:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Property"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"stream"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryStream"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Thread-safe event stream with push (",["$","code",null,{"children":"on"}],"/",["$","code",null,{"children":"on_any"}]," callbacks) and pull (",["$","code",null,{"children":"listen"}]," iterator) patterns for real-time memory notifications"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"compressor"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryCompressor"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Dictionary-based, RLE, and semantic compression strategies for reducing memory footprint"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"patterns"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"PatternDetector"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Detects temporal (hour/weekday), content (keyword frequency, co-occurrence), and sequence patterns across memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"delta_sync"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"DeltaSync"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Incremental synchronization between Mnemosyne instances with checkpointed resume support"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"plugins"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"PluginManager"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Discovers and manages plugins from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/plugins/"}],". Built-in: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"LoggingPlugin"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MetricsPlugin"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"FilterPlugin"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CompressionPlugin"}]]}]]}]]}]]}]
5e:["$","$L9b",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n\n# Access the stream for real-time notifications\nmem.stream.on(EventType.MEMORY_ADDED, lambda event: print(f\"New memory: {event}\"))\n\n# Listen to stream as an iterator\nfor event in mem.stream.listen():\n  print(f\"Event: {event.event_type.name} - {event.memory_id}\")\n\n# Detect patterns across stored memories\npatterns = mem.detect_patterns()\n\n# Or get a summary\nsummary = mem.summarize_patterns()\n\n# Incremental sync to a peer\ndelta = mem.sync_to(peer_id=\"remote-1\")\n\n# Apply a sync from a peer\nresult = mem.sync_from(peer_id=\"remote-1\", delta=received_delta)\n","language":"python"}]
5f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"MemoryStream API"}]
60:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"stream"}]," property exposes a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryStream"}]," with these methods:"]}]
61:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Method"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Signature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"on"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"on(event_type: EventType, callback: Callable)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Register a callback for a specific event type"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"on_any"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"on_any(callback: Callable)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Register a callback for all event types"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"off"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"off(event_type: EventType, callback: Callable)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Remove a specific callback"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"off_any"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"off_any(callback: Callable)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Remove an any-event callback"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"emit"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"emit(event: MemoryEvent)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Emit an event to all callbacks and iterators"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"listen"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"listen(event_types=None) -> Iterator[MemoryEvent]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Return an iterator that yields events as they occur"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"get_buffer"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"get_buffer(event_types=None, since=None) -> list[MemoryEvent]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Get buffered events, optionally filtered"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"clear_buffer"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"clear_buffer()"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Clear the event buffer"}]]}]]}]]}]
62:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"DeltaSync API"}]
63:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"delta_sync"}]," property exposes a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"DeltaSync"}]," with these methods:"]}]
64:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Method"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Signature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"get_checkpoint"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"get_checkpoint(peer_id) -> Optional[SyncCheckpoint]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Get the last sync checkpoint for a peer"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"set_checkpoint"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"set_checkpoint(peer_id, checkpoint)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Set the sync checkpoint for a peer"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"compute_delta"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"compute_delta(peer_id, table='working_memory') -> list[dict]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Compute changes since last sync"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"apply_delta"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"apply_delta(peer_id, delta, table='working_memory') -> dict"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Apply a received delta"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_to"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_to(peer_id, table='working_memory') -> dict"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Compute and checkpoint a delta (convenience)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_from"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_from(peer_id, delta, table='working_memory') -> dict"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Apply and checkpoint a delta (convenience)"}]]}]]}]]}]
65:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"PatternDetector API"}]
66:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"patterns"}]," property exposes a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"PatternDetector"}]," with these methods:"]}]
67:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Method"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Signature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_temporal"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_temporal(memories) -> list[DetectedPattern]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Detect hour-of-day and day-of-week patterns"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_content"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_content(memories) -> list[DetectedPattern]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Detect frequent keywords and co-occurrence"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_sequence"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_sequence(memories) -> list[DetectedPattern]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Detect source-based sequence patterns"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_all"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_all(memories) -> list[DetectedPattern]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Run all detectors, sorted by confidence"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"summarize_patterns"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"summarize_patterns(memories) -> dict"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Human-readable summary of all patterns"}]]}]]}]]}]
68:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Scratchpad"}]
69:["$","p",null,{"children":"A lightweight temporary scratchpad for transient notes that do not belong in the memory hierarchy."}]
6a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"scratchpad_write"}]
6b:["$","$L9b",null,{"code":"scratchpad_write(content: str) -> str\n","language":"python"}]
6c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Appends a note to the scratchpad. Returns the note ID."}]
6d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"scratchpad_read"}]
6e:["$","$L9b",null,{"code":"scratchpad_read() -> list[dict]\n","language":"python"}]

8f:["$","$L9b",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import remember, recall, get_context, get_stats\nfrom mnemosyne import forget, get, update, sleep, sleep_all_sessions\nfrom mnemosyne import scratchpad_write, scratchpad_read, scratchpad_clear\n\n# These are equivalent to using Mnemosyne() with session_id=\"default\"\nremember(\"Some important fact\")\nresults = recall(\"important fact\")\n","language":"python"}]
